2026-02-27T12:34:26.9595560Z ##[group]Run # Copy Copilot session state files to logs folder for artifact collection
2026-02-27T12:34:26.9596192Z [36;1m# Copy Copilot session state files to logs folder for artifact collection[0m
2026-02-27T12:34:26.9596737Z [36;1m# This ensures they are in /tmp/gh-aw/ where secret redaction can scan them[0m
2026-02-27T12:34:26.9597186Z [36;1mSESSION_STATE_DIR="$HOME/.copilot/session-state"[0m
2026-02-27T12:34:26.9597537Z [36;1mLOGS_DIR="/tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/agent/logs"[0m
2026-02-27T12:34:26.9597821Z [36;1m[0m
2026-02-27T12:34:26.9598023Z [36;1mif [ -d "$SESSION_STATE_DIR" ]; then[0m
2026-02-27T12:34:26.9598448Z [36;1m  echo "Copying Copilot session state files from $SESSION_STATE_DIR to $LOGS_DIR"[0m
2026-02-27T12:34:26.9598872Z [36;1m  mkdir -p "$LOGS_DIR"[0m
2026-02-27T12:34:26.9599224Z [36;1m  cp -v "$SESSION_STATE_DIR"/*.jsonl "$LOGS_DIR/" 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-02-27T12:34:26.9599641Z [36;1m  echo "Session state files copied successfully"[0m
2026-02-27T12:34:26.9599942Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-02-27T12:34:26.9600261Z [36;1m  echo "No session-state directory found at $SESSION_STATE_DIR"[0m
2026-02-27T12:34:26.9600600Z [36;1mfi[0m
2026-02-27T12:34:26.9649764Z shell: /usr/bin/bash -e {0}
2026-02-27T12:34:26.9650028Z env:
2026-02-27T12:34:26.9650215Z   DEFAULT_BRANCH: master
2026-02-27T12:34:26.9650458Z   GH_AW_ASSETS_ALLOWED_EXTS: 
2026-02-27T12:34:26.9650695Z   GH_AW_ASSETS_BRANCH: 
2026-02-27T12:34:26.9650912Z   GH_AW_ASSETS_MAX_SIZE_KB: 0
2026-02-27T12:34:26.9651199Z   GH_AW_MCP_LOG_DIR: /tmp/gh-aw/mcp-logs/safeoutputs
2026-02-27T12:34:26.9651574Z   GH_AW_SAFE_OUTPUTS: /opt/gh-aw/safeoutputs/outputs.jsonl
2026-02-27T12:34:26.9651992Z   GH_AW_SAFE_OUTPUTS_CONFIG_PATH: /opt/gh-aw/safeoutputs/config.json
